title: Dezzer Acrylic Display Case Box with Black Base, Assemble Countertop Clear Acrylic Dustproof Protection Showcase for Action Figures Toys, Collectibles, Home Storage (30x20x20cm)
features: Size: Outside size: 11.8''L x 7.9''W x 7.9'' H (30 cm x 20 cm x 20 cm). Inside size: 11.2"L x 7.3"W x 7.7"H (28.6 cm x 18.5 cm x 19.5 cm).

Easy to Assemble & Choose: Just connect the sides, top and head. The edges are smooth and the acrylic case fiting perfectly against the base. Besides, you only need to measure the height/length and depth/width of your figurine before buying, then can order the display cases size you need.

Material: The display case is made of high quality acrylic. With double layers of protective film on the surface to protect the acrylic board and your souvenirs or dolls from dust and odours. Please remove the protective film before use.

Unique Mirror Design: 4-sided transparent design that makes the content visible, the bottom side being black. One side designed with a mirror makes you can see your collectible more clearly when you put it in a corner or against a wall.

Multi-Use Countertop Box Display: These display boxes are the perfect complement for business displays or household items, such as figurines, collectibles, toys, artifacts, sports memorabilia, jewellery, antiques, dolls, action figures, souveniers, models, statues, heirlooms, and sculptures. Can be used in home, museums, retail stores or trade shows.
